status: Fixed in planning-card import-required route lane
area: Tasks import / next routing / planning-card ledger sync
finding: After a planning card exists in `3KLife`, `next` can remain stuck on the previously imported task because the newer card has not yet entered the target ledger. In Captain/Team Broker mode this makes the official queue look like it is still on the old M9I task, even though the operator intends to advance to the next planning card.
expectedBehavior: `next --prompt` should either import/register the referenced planning card into the target ledger when enough path/context exists, or emit an explicit `planning-card-not-in-target-ledger` action with the exact `tasks import --from <card> --write` command before recommending or reselecting an already-imported task.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed by adding `atm.planningCardImportRequirement.v1` to prompt-scoped markdown planning-card routes and queue heads. When a route resolves to a planning card that is not an imported target-ledger task, `nextAction.command` / `requiredCommand` point to `node atm.mjs tasks import --from <card> --write --json`, while the eventual task-scoped claim command remains available. Verification: `node --strip-types scripts/validate-prompt-scoped-next.ts` covers shorthand external planning-card routing and import-required evidence.
followUp: Keep ledger JSON tasks on normal claim routes; only non-ledger planning cards receive the import-required payload.
